scripts.db:migrate: pnpm -C ../.. exec narduk-starter-toolkit db-migrate clawdle-db --local --dir node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer-core/drizzle --dir drizzle
scripts.quality: echo 'Turbo dependsOn handles lint + typecheck + format:check'
scripts.db:reset: pnpm -C ../.. exec narduk-starter-toolkit db-migrate clawdle-db --local --dir node_modules/@narduk-enterprises/narduk-nuxt-template-layer-core/drizzle --dir drizzle --reset && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.db:ready: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.cf:build: if [ -n "${NARDUK_PLATFORM_GH_PACKAGES_READ:-${NARDUK_PLATFORM_GH_PACKAGES_RW:-}}" ]; then pnpm -C ../.. run package-registry:auth && NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG="$(cd ../.. && pwd)/.npmrc.auth" NPM_CONFIG_GLOBALCONFIG=/dev/null pnpm -C ../.. install --frozen-lockfile; else pnpm -C ../.. install --frozen-lockfile; fi && pnpm run build
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm exec narduk-starter-toolkit wrangler-deploy deploy production
scripts.cf:deploy:staging: pnpm exec narduk-starter-toolkit wrangler-deploy deploy staging
scripts.cf:deploy:preview: pnpm exec narduk-starter-toolkit wrangler-deploy versions-upload preview
